name: calendar
description: Calendar-Schublade: lokale manuelle Events (data/chat.db) plus Google Calendar (Sub-Kalender Klaus/Privat/Beispielkunde/FCH/AI Workshop/AI Agent/AI Beratung). PT-Termine kommen aus people.db (kein Google-Sync mehr). Provider unter providers/google.py. Server bindet via app.include_router(modules.calendar.core.router).

files.hint: Created by the backend on first start. Stores local calendar_events.
